full_text: Keep runtime deterministic. Prefer packet assembly, feedback scoring, and persistence flows that produce stable results from the same inputs so debugging and trust do not drift.

Do not skip fragment feedback. Every fragment sent in a packet should receive an explicit verdict so retrieval quality changes are grounded in concrete evidence instead of vague session-level impressions.
Validate packet before commit. Check selected fragments, packet scope, and feedback coverage before persisting changes so Athena does not learn from malformed packets.

summary: Tracer bullet uses fixed fixture fragments.
full_text: Tracer bullet uses fixed fixture fragments. Early end-to-end tests rely on deterministic fixture data so packet and feedback behavior can be verified before retrieval and ranking become more sophisticated.
